name: 5dim_resources
title: 5Dim's mod - Resources
author: 5Dim
description:
Resources module for 5Dim's mod
Expands smelting and ore processing
This mod includes:
- 10 tiers of electric furnaces
- 10 tiers of mashers (ore grinders)
- Dust intermediates (ore -> dust -> plate for bonus yield)
- Industrial furnace recipes
